title: Polymorphism, Protocols, and Abstract Contracts · Behavior Case: Oop Null Object Strategy
summary: Support interchangeable storage, notification, pricing, and item-policy implementations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop null object strategy increment in a protocol-driven circulation application. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use null objects or strategies when they preserve a real role contract better than repeated None branching.
Evaluate subtypes against preconditions, postconditions, invariants, exceptions, and semantic expectations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
